name: Password Manager Extraction - KeePass, 1Password Database Access
description: Detects password manager credential extraction by monitoring for non-authorized access to .kdbx, 1Password vaults, and password manager cache files. Covers KeeThief, KeeFarce, keepass2john tool usage.
query: any where ((file.extension : ("kdbx", "kdb") and not process.name : "KeePass.exe") or process.args : ("*KeeThief*", "*KeeFarce*", "*keepass2john*", "*KeePassHax*"))
